purpose: Breaking the sales-lock. Batch 1 looked diverse but every dimension clustered into 'commercial scale' (sales/revenue/exports/consumption/production). This redo bans commercial dimensions entirely and mines candy's non-money axes: physical structure, sensory extremes, ingredients/chemistry, design, history. Demonstrates the explicit cluster-check method. Every fact web-verified. NOT filed to the library.

cluster_audit.verdict: 7 questions, largest cluster = 2/7 (29%), zero commercial. Honest finding: candy's verifiable non-commercial rankings are genuinely thin — this is near the ceiling, not a cherry-picked 7 of 20.

candidates.q: Which classic chocolate bar is the lightest for its size, because its middle is whipped full of air?
candidates.note: Whipped nougat centre, ~45% less fat than the average bar — low enough density it nearly floats. Finalists 3 Musketeers, Milky Way, Snickers, Mars bar.

candidates.q: Which kind of hard candy is built to last longest in your mouth before it dissolves?
candidates.note: Concentric hard-sugar layers each dissolve at a different rate, stretching it out for an hour-plus on the big ones. Finalists jawbreaker, lollipop, Life Savers, butterscotch disc.

candidates.q: Which widely-sold candy is the most mouth-puckeringly sour of them all?
candidates.note: CONTESTED, reveal teaches it: Toxic Waste has held the popular 'world's sourest' title for ~20 years, driving mouth pH below 2 (about stomach-acid territory); Warheads is a clear notch milder; the UK's Barnett's Mega Sour (pH ~1.6) is cited as technically sourer but is far more obscure. A guesser who said Warheads learns they picked the famous one, not the fiercest. Finalists Toxic Waste, Warheads, Barnett's Mega Sour.

candidates.q: Setting aside candies made with coffee, which ordinary sweet carries the most caffeine?
candidates.note: Cocoa solids contain caffeine, so the darker the chocolate the more it has (~12 mg/oz for dark vs little in milk, none in white). Defeats the 'candy has no caffeine' assumption. Finalists dark chocolate, milk chocolate, white chocolate.

candidates.q: Which jelly-bean brand makes its name on offering far more distinct flavours than any rival?
candidates.note: An official permanent lineup of 50 flavours, built from 23 real fruit juices and purees, plus rotating limited editions. Finalists Jelly Belly, Brach's, Starburst, Skittles.

candidates.q: Which candy brand has been made without interruption in America longer than any other?
candidates.note: CONTESTED, reveal teaches it: Necco Wafers date to 1847 — older — but went out of production 2018-2020, breaking the chain; that's why the metric is 'without interruption.' A guesser who said Necco learns the gap is the whole point. Finalists Good & Plenty, Necco Wafers, Tootsie Roll, Hershey bar.

candidates.q: Which everyday chocolate is moulded so that you snap off a row of identical triangular peaks?
candidates.note: Borderline-identity, included to test the line: there IS light reasoning (triangular-prism chocolates are a tiny set), but it leans recognizable. Flag for your read on whether this is a bet or a giveaway. Finalists Toblerone, Ritter Sport (square), Hershey bar (rectangles).
